title: Sizable Slimes
description: Slimes are a nuisance. Even more so with this mod!
body:
# Sizable Slimes

Sometimes slimes are annoying... especially in superflat worlds.
This mod is here to make them even more annoying by making them bigger each time they jump!

This mod also adds a config with a configurable max size for slimes.

This mod was brought to you by [Infernal Studios](https://infernalstudios.org)
